query: SELECT pc.page_id AS "page_id!", pc.inbound_link_count AS "mat_in!: i64", pc.child_block_count AS "mat_ch!: i64", (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bl.source_id) FROM block_links AS bl INNER JOIN blocks AS descendant ON bl.target_id = descendant.id WHERE descendant.page_id = pc.page_id AND descendant.deleted_at IS NULL) AS "calc_in!: i64", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blocks AS descendant WHERE descendant.page_id = pc.page_id AND descendant.deleted_at IS NULL AND descendant.id != pc.page_id) AS "calc_ch!: i64" FROM pages_cache AS pc
